checks.detail: 7 proposed, 1 accepted, but no individual move receipts were serialized
checks.name: field aggregate topology accounting is internally consistent
all prospective PLY artifacts reload finite with bound counts

protocol_deviations.finding: The frozen protocol required individual topology receipts. The execution serialized only aggregate counts (7 proposals, 1 accepted) and the final model/hash. Field quality remains auditable, but move-level topology utility is not.
